faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in Wantagh?
faqs.answer: Ant control services in Wantagh typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the type of ants present. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Wantagh homes?
faqs.answer: Wantagh residents most frequently encounter carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wooden structures, while odorous house ants are attracted to moisture and food sources in kitchens and bathrooms.
